title: What It Actually Looks Like to Be Loyal and Still Call Him Out
caption:
A brother who only agrees with you isn't safe. He's just quiet.

Proverbs calls it faithful wounds, the confrontation that proves the love instead of ending it. Loyalty runs both ways or it isn't loyalty, it's just an audience.

Pick men who'll say the hard thing, then stay in the room after you've said it back.

#faith #brotherhood #accountability #christianman #godlyman
